description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

prTitle: Atomic Atlas: decompose Sky Atlas.md into one-folder-per-document tree + sync tooling

diff: For SparkLend, the Assets In Scope for the Bug Bounty Program is specified on SparkLend’s listing on the Immunefi platform, which can be found at ([https://immunefi.com/bounty/sparklend/](https://immunefi.com/bounty/sparklend/)). For SparkLend, the Assets In Scope only include smart contracts.
is responsible for maintaining these lists of Assets In Scope, in consultation with the relevant stakeholders.
